← Recipes

Carrot Cake

Cake Ingredients

  • 1½ cups oil
  • 1 cup brown sugar
  • 1 cup sugar
  • 4 eggs
  • 2 cups flour
  • 2 tsp baking soda
  • 1 tsp salt
  • 2 tsp cinnamon
  • 2 cups grated carrots

Cream Cheese Frosting

  • 1 package (8 oz) cream cheese
  • ½ stick margarine (4 tbsp)
  • 2 tsp vanilla
  • 1 lb confectioners' sugar
  • 1 cup nuts, optional

Directions

  1. Preheat oven to 350°F.

  2. Blend oil and sugars. Add eggs one at a time, beating after each.

  3. Sift flour and mix with remaining dry ingredients (except carrots).

  4. Add the sugar mixture to the flour mixture and mix well.

  5. Fold in carrots last and pour into an ungreased flat cake pan (with all the oil you certainly don't need to add more grease).

  6. Bake 40–45 minutes. Serve with cream cheese frosting.

Directions

  1. Mix all frosting ingredients well.

  2. Ice the cake once it is completely cool.
